🪝 The Claw Drop

// blueprints

Automation Blueprints

Step-by-step guides for building real automations with OpenClaw. Copy, tweak, deploy.

This AI Content Factory Writes, Researches, and Designs While You Sleep
A multi-agent system where one AI researches trending topics, another writes scripts and posts, and a third generates thumbnails. Every morning at 8am, your content pipeline delivers fresh, ready-to-publish work.
March 25, 2026 Beginner $10-200/month (depending on model choice) 30-60 minutes
Find Your Next Product Idea in 15 Seconds by Scanning Reddit and X
Install one skill, type one sentence, and your AI scans 30 days of Reddit, X, and the web for what people are complaining about, what they wish existed, and where competitors are falling short.
March 25, 2026 Beginner $0-10/month (free web-only mode available) 5 minutes
How One AI Prompt Landed 6 Paying Clients in a Week
An AI agent scraped 350 local businesses, built each one a custom website, mailed physical postcards with QR codes, and closed 6 monthly clients. Total AI cost: $7.
March 25, 2026 Intermediate ~$350 total ($7 AI tokens + ~$300 postcards) 1-2 hours (first time), 10 minutes after that
Turn Your AI Into a Real-Time Assistant That Listens, Remembers, and Acts for $50
A $50 wearable captures every conversation, meeting, and idea in real time. Your OpenClaw agent turns it into tasks, follow-ups, searchable memory, and daily briefs without you touching your phone.
March 25, 2026 Beginner $50 one-time (Bee Pioneer) + $5-50/month (AI model) 30-60 minutes
Your AI Remembers Everything So You Don't Have To
Text your AI anything worth remembering. A book recommendation, a business idea, a meeting note. It stores everything and builds you a searchable second brain you can query from anywhere.
March 25, 2026 Beginner $5-50/month (depending on model choice) 15-30 minutes
Automate Your Entire Amazon Merch Upload Pipeline
Drop a design into a folder and walk away. Your AI agent removes the background, upscales it, repositions it to Amazon's specs, generates validated keywords, and uploads the listing. From image to live product in minutes.
March 18, 2026 Intermediate $5-20/month (image processing APIs) 4-6 hours (first time teaching the agent)
Research Your Competitors' Ads and Launch Your Own Campaign on Meta
Four AI agents analyze competitor ads from the Meta Ad Library, plan a campaign based on your brand, create all the assets, and publish everything to your Meta Ads account. Full pipeline from research to live campaigns in draft.
March 18, 2026 Intermediate $20-30 per full run (API costs) 2-3 hours
Replace Your CRM With a Conversation
Install one skill and your AI agent becomes your CRM. Contacts, deals, follow-ups, notes. All managed through chat. No dashboards to learn, no data entry, no $50/month subscription.
March 18, 2026 Beginner Free (open source) 15-30 minutes
Run Your AI Assistant 24/7 for $0/Month
Set up an always-on AI agent on Oracle Cloud's free tier. 4 CPU cores, 24GB RAM, 200GB storage. No credit card charges, no trial period, no surprise bills. Ever.
March 18, 2026 Beginner $0/month (forever) 30-45 minutes
Turn Any Windows PC Into a Web Automation Machine
Set up parallel browser automation on a spare PC. Your agent controls 4+ Chrome instances at once, each logged into different accounts. No code, no Selenium, no proxies.
March 16, 2026 Beginner $0 (uses existing hardware) 30-60 minutes
AI Whispers What to Say During Your Cold Calls in Real Time
An AI listens to your live sales calls and gives you real-time coaching on what to say next based on how the conversation is going.
March 10, 2026 Intermediate $20-40/month (transcription + API) 3-5 hours
Your AI Makes Your Coffee, Orders Your Lunch, and Answers Your Phone
Physical world automation is here. One builder connected OpenClaw to an espresso machine, food ordering, and a phone agent that talks to callers and relays to your AI.
March 10, 2026 Intermediate $15-40/month (Vapi + API costs) 4-6 hours
AI Finds Leads, Builds Demo Sites, and Cold Calls Them For You
One agency owner built a full lead gen pipeline: find prospects, research them, build custom demo sites, deploy them, create video walkthroughs, and reach out via text and phone. All automated.
March 10, 2026 Advanced $50-100/month (hosting + API + phone) 1-2 weeks
This AI Trades Stocks on a Live Account While You Sleep
An OpenClaw agent monitors markets and executes trades autonomously using heartbeats. One builder is running it on a real account right now.
March 10, 2026 Advanced $20-50/month (API costs) 1-2 days
Turn 1,000 WhatsApp Voice Messages Into a Searchable Knowledge Base
Your team's best ideas are buried in voice messages. This system transcribes them, cross-references with project history, and builds a searchable archive of everything your team has ever discussed.
March 10, 2026 Intermediate $10-30/month (transcription API) 3-5 hours
Build an AI Job Search Agent That Applies While You Sleep
A developer doubled his salary in 3 days by letting his AI agent apply to 100+ jobs. Here's how to build the same system.
March 3, 2026 Intermediate $20-40/month (API + optional tools) 2-3 hours
Build an Autonomous Business Bot (The Felix Method)
Give your AI agent $1,000 and a goal. Nat Eliason's bot made $14,718 in 3 weeks. Here's the exact 3-layer memory system and setup.
March 3, 2026 Advanced $20-50/month (API costs) 2-3 hours
Set Up a 4-Agent Business Team on a Mac Mini
One solopreneur runs customer support, content, research, and ops with 4 AI agents on a $600 Mac Mini. Here's the architecture.
March 3, 2026 Intermediate $20-60/month (API costs) 3-4 hours
Cut Your AI Agent Costs by 97% with Multi-Model Routing
One user dropped from $90/month to $6 by routing tasks to the right model. Here's the exact setup.
March 3, 2026 Beginner $6-15/month (down from $60-90) 30 minutes
Replace Your SaaS Stack With One AI Agent
One founder cut $500/month in SaaS fees to zero using a single OpenClaw agent on a Mac Mini. Here's how to replicate it.
March 3, 2026 Intermediate $0-20/month (API costs only) 4-6 hours
AI Wins Your Insurance Dispute
Your AI drafts the appeal, cites the right policy sections, and gets a rejected claim overturned. No lawyer needed.
February 24, 2026 Beginner Free 30 min
AI Negotiates Sponsorship Deals for You
Your AI handles sponsor outreach, rate card discussions, and deal negotiation via email so you can focus on creating content.
February 24, 2026 Intermediate Free 45 min
The 5-Day Automation Sprint: $22K Found in Tax Deductions
Give your AI full access to your digital life for 5 days. It found $22K in missed tax deductions, built a content pipeline, and sent daily love notes to his wife.
February 24, 2026 Intermediate Free 1 day (setup), 4 days (let it run)
Run Your Business on AI (While Living Your Life)
Jesse Genet runs her company on OpenClaw from a Mac Mini. Amazon orders, printing, procurement, all automated while she homeschools 4 kids.
February 24, 2026 Intermediate $10-50/month (API costs) 1-2 days (gradual)
AI Negotiates Your Car Purchase, Saves $4,200
Your AI handles the back-and-forth with dealerships via email, knows market value, and closes a better deal than you would.
February 17, 2026 Beginner Free 20 min
AI Grocery Shopping with a Virtual Credit Card
Your AI orders groceries online using a virtual card, handles substitutions, and keeps your fridge stocked without you lifting a finger.
February 17, 2026 Beginner Free (+ groceries) 30 min
AI Launches a Token Autonomously
The Asymmetrix team gave their AI agent full autonomy to create and launch a crypto token. It did everything: branding, smart contract, liquidity, and marketing.
February 17, 2026 Advanced $50-500 (gas + liquidity) 2-3 hours
Bot-to-Bot Commerce: AIs Negotiating with AIs
Multiple AI agents coordinating, negotiating, and transacting with each other in a shared environment. The future of automated business operations.
February 17, 2026 Advanced Free 2+ hours
Build a Polymarket Trading Bot
An AI that monitors prediction markets, analyzes events, and executes trades based on your strategy while you focus on your day job.
February 17, 2026 Intermediate Free (+ trading capital) 1-2 hours
